'''Antbbianplourr III''' was the [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] of [[Eiattu 6]] during the final days of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. He bartered with the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] to keep the throne and Imperials away from the world. He was succeeded by his only son [[Uthorrferrell Cartha]]. His brother was Grand Duke [[Gror Pernon]].
